_comment: Auto-generated by src/threshold_researcher.py. Both the metric set and thresholds are researched each run. These are starting defaults derived from the v1 spec — run `python main.py --mode research` to refresh from the live Zillow Preferred program.
source: v1 starting defaults — refresh via --mode research before each monthly run

speed_to_action.label: Speed to Action
speed_to_action.description: Median time from inbound Zillow lead to first agent contact. Target is under 5 minutes.

work_with_rate.label: Work-With Rate
work_with_rate.description: Percentage of qualified Zillow leads the agent successfully signs to a working relationship.

csat.label: Customer Satisfaction
csat.description: Average CSAT / sentiment score from Zillow lead surveys. Target is 85%+.

appt_set_rate.label: Appointment Set Rate
appt_set_rate.description: Share of qualified leads where the agent successfully booked an appointment.

appt_met_rate.label: Appointment Met Rate
appt_met_rate.description: Share of booked appointments that the lead actually attended (showed up).
